summary: Frontend testing of Insurance Infrastructure dedicated page at /solutions/insurance-infrastructure. All 21 sections render correctly with exact expected counts. All other routes (/, /solutions, /dexa, /contact) return 200 with no JS errors.

tests_executed.page_load: PASS - Insurance Infrastructure page loads at /solutions/insurance-infrastructure with no JS errors
tests_executed.hero_headline: PASS - 'Insurance Infrastructure for Insurers, Reinsurers, Brokers, MGAs, TPAs, and Embedded Partners'
tests_executed.hero_cards: PASS - 9 cards with exact labels: Quote Builder, Policy Lifecycle, Claims, Reinsurance, Broker Dashboard, Embedded APIs, Service Center, Underwriting, DEXA Intelligence
tests_executed.dexa_disclaimers: PASS - contains 'does not replace underwriters' and 'does not replace brokers'
tests_executed.dexa_scenarios: PASS - 5 scenarios, all with action button groups
tests_executed.final_cta: PASS - both 'Build Insurance Infrastructure' and 'Talk to Mentor Global' buttons present (data-testids ins-final-build-cta, ins-final-talk-cta)
tests_executed.other_routes: PASS - /, /solutions, /dexa, /contact all return 200 with no JS errors

critical_code_review_comments: Page document title remains 'Mentor Global | Health Fintech Infrastructure' on the Insurance Infrastructure page; consider per-page <title> updates via react-helmet for SEO (minor, not blocking).
InsuranceInfrastructure.jsx (652 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold. Sections could be split into separate components/files for maintainability (non-blocking).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (17/17 count checks + headline + DEXA disclaimers + CTAs + route checks all passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Insurance Infrastructure page at /solutions/insurance-infrastructure is fully working. Validation was done via DOM count queries on data-testid containers (ins-hero, ins-problem, ins-stack, ins-rails-visual, ins-companies, ins-lines, ins-stakeholders, ins-journeys, ins-modules, ins-broker, ins-reinsurance, ins-service-center, ins-dexa, ins-dexa-scenarios, ins-architecture, ins-deployment, ins-use-cases, ins-outcomes, ins-final-cta) plus textContent checks for headline/disclaimers/CTAs. Page is long (~26K body chars); use scroll loop to trigger ScrollReveal before assertions. No backend testing required for this iteration.
